projectDetailReport.description: Shows cage performance by project together with feeding and wastage details.
projectDetailReport.pickProjectFirst: Select a project to see report details.
projectDetailReport.noMissingFeedDay: No missing feeding days were found in the selected date range.
projectDetailReport.dailyDetailsHint: The most recent transaction lines are listed by date.
projectDetailReport.cageHistoryDescription: Cages that were used before in the project but are not currently active.
projectDetailReport.readGuideTitle: How Do I Read the Report?
projectDetailReport.readGuideDescription: The cards show the project total, the lower drop-down rows show cage-based daily transactions.
projectDetailReport.readGuideCurrentFish: Available Fish: The number of live fish from the beginning, less fish waste and shipments.
projectDetailReport.readGuideShipment: Shipment Quantity: on the left is the quantity, on the right is the total of grams of biomass.
projectDetailReport.readGuideDelta: Delta columns show net intraday change (+/-).
projectDetailReport.readGuideButtons: When you click on the Transfer/Shipment/Conversion button, the detail lines for that day will open.
projectDetailReport.consistencyFormula: Consistency check: Start - Wastage - Shipment = Available
projectDetailReport.mainSummaryDescription: Total current status of active meshes in the project.
